name: Pinup

releases.author: pilafdob
releases.description:
## Pinup 1.0.1

- Show inline pin controls beside pinned files and folders on mobile.
- Keep native file-row taps intact so only the pin control unpins an item.
- Refine the mobile pin-up shelf into a roomier, touch-friendly island.

releases.author: pilafdob
releases.description:
## Pinup 1.0.0

The first stable public release of Pinup for Obsidian.

### Highlights

- Pin files and folders above their unpinned siblings without changing their folder hierarchy.
- Add items to a compact pin-up shelf while leaving their original File Explorer entries in place.
- Preserve deterministic pin ordering across restarts.
- Use desktop context menus and saved-pin controls, with Command-click on macOS or Control-click on Windows/Linux to switch a normal pin to pin-up.
- Preserve native one-tap navigation on mobile; pin and pin up through long-press menus.
- Remove shelf items directly through their desktop or mobile context menu.
- Prefer Nicons' Phosphor push-pin when available, with an isolated native Lucide fallback.

Pinup makes no network requests, includes no telemetry, and does not modify notes, frontmatter, filenames, or folders.

### Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below and place them in `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/pinup/`, or install this release with BRAT.

Requires Obsidian 1.4.16 or newer.
releases.name: Pinup 1.0.0
